target: (The sound of the waves, the sway of the ferry, the scent of the tide... Things that were completely normal and familiar to me until two years ago.)
(It's so nostalgic that it almost feels unreal somehow.)
(Hitogashima Island, the hometown I've returned to after two years...)
(The reason for this is... a message I never could have imagined.)
Ah, Mio? It's been a while.
Sorry I couldn't answer the phone. It looks like you called many times, did something happen?
(Hearing her sorrowful voice, a bad premonition ran through me.)
(Did something happen to Alain, who raised me? Or to my best friend Sou, or his sister Toki-chan...?)
(Feeling my heart begin to pound rapidly, I focused all my nerves on Mio's voice coming from the other side of the phone—)
(Honestly, I still can't believe it. No, it's probably more accurate to say that I can't accept it.)
(Ushio is my childhood friend, the family I grew up with, and...)
What are you spacing out for! You weren't listening to me again, were you~?
I told you. Close your eyes for a sec.
(Wh-What is it...? She's touching my face a lot...?)
Wh... what did you just do!?
A present? I... I don't get it!
Shinpei... Do you know how many years it's been since you returned to the island?
Eh? Ah... Since the junior high graduation ceremony, so...
Seriously, you didn't even come back for New Year's~~.
Say hi to everyone for me when you get back!
What do you mean...? Ushio... you're coming too—
Make sure you find me properly.
Wh... What is this!! Wait... wait!
